sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74396" key="o)cufeggh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-φεγγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n74396.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bright-beaming,</tr_> epith. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥόδα,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0328.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
